feature.name: Shelter of the Faithful
feature.desc: You and your companions can receive free healing and care at a temple of your faith. You have a residence at a temple.

feature.name: False Identity
feature.desc: You have a second identity including documentation, established acquaintances, and disguises.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set

feature.name: Criminal Contact
feature.desc: You have a reliable contact in the criminal underworld who acts as your liaison to a network of criminals.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of musical instrument

feature.name: By Popular Demand
feature.desc: You can always find a place to perform. You receive free lodging and food and gain the favor of your audience.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of artisan's tools

feature.name: Rustic Hospitality
feature.desc: Common folk will hide you, help you, and shelter you from authorities when needed.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of artisan's tools

feature.name: Guild Membership
feature.desc: Your guild offers lodging and food, legal assistance, and access to powerful political figures through the guild.

feature.name: Discovery
feature.desc: Your solitary life led you to a unique discovery — a secret of the multiverse, forgotten knowledge, or great truth.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set

feature.name: Position of Privilege
feature.desc: People assume the best of you. You are welcome in high society and common folk make every effort to accommodate you.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of musical instrument

feature.name: Wanderer
feature.desc: You have an excellent memory for maps and geography, and can always find food and fresh water in the wilderness.

feature.name: Researcher
feature.desc: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, you know where to find it — libraries, sages, or other sources.

feature.name: Ship's Passage
feature.desc: You can secure free passage on a sailing ship for yourself and companions in exchange for work.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set

feature.name: Military Rank
feature.desc: You have a military rank. Soldiers loyal to your old organization recognize your authority and defer to you.

feature.name: City Secrets
feature.desc: You know secret passages and back-alleys of any city. You can travel twice normal speed through cities without being noticed.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set

feature.name: Criminal Contact
feature.desc: You have a reliable contact in an intelligence network who acts as your liaison.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of musical instrument

feature.name: By Popular Demand
feature.desc: You can always find a place to perform in arenas. Audiences adore you and you receive free lodging and food.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set

feature.name: Retainers
feature.desc: You have the service of three retainers loyal to your family — commoners who perform mundane tasks for you.

feature.name: Bad Reputation
feature.desc: People fear you. You can get away with minor criminal offenses in most ports. Commoners won't report you to authorities.

feature.name: Adept Linguist
feature.desc: You can communicate with humanoids who don't share a language by observing their culture and behavior over 1 day.

proficiencies: Tool: Cartographer's tools or navigator's tools

feature.name: Historical Knowledge
feature.desc: When you enter a ruin or dungeon, you can correctly ascertain its original purpose and determine its builders.

feature.name: Watcher's Eye
feature.desc: You can find local watch outposts and criminal lairs in any city. Guards treat you as a peer and share information.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of artisan's tools

feature.name: Respect of the Stout Folk
feature.desc: Dwarves and non-dwarf crafters of exceptional skill respect you. You receive shelter and assistance from dwarven communities.

proficiencies: Skill: Arcana or Nature or Religion

feature.name: Library Access
feature.desc: You have access to most libraries and can obtain permission to enter restricted sections with little trouble.

feature.name: Court Functionary
feature.desc: You know the ins and outs of bureaucracy. You can obtain an audience with a local noble within 1 day.

proficiencies: Skill: One Intelligence Wisdom or Charisma skill

feature.name: Safe Haven
feature.desc: Your faction has safehouses and contacts throughout the region. You can get a safe place to hide and basic assistance.

feature.name: All Eyes on You
feature.desc: Your exotic appearance draws attention. Commoners stare and powerful people want to meet you, granting social access.

feature.name: Heart of Darkness
feature.desc: Those who look into your eyes see darkness. Common folk are uneasy around you but will give you shelter if needed.

proficiencies: Skill: Arcana or History or Religion

feature.name: Inheritance
feature.desc: You are the owner of an inheritance — an object, land, title, or knowledge passed to you to safeguard or use.

source_title: Sword Coast Adventurer's Guide (Variant City Watch)

feature.name: Watcher's Eye
feature.desc: You can easily find the local criminal element and watch outposts in any settlement.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set

feature.name: Mercenary Life
feature.desc: You know mercenary groups and can find work, legal assistance, and camaraderie among them in any large city.

proficiencies: Tool: Thieves' tools or musical instrument or gaming set

feature.name: Ear to the Ground
feature.desc: You are in frequent contact with the criminal underworld. You know who to ask to find information about people and places.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of musical instrument or artisan's tools

feature.name: Uthgardt Heritage
feature.desc: You know the wilderness and tribal lands of the North. Allied tribes offer food, shelter, and safe passage.

proficiencies: Tool: One type of gaming set or musical instrument

feature.name: Kept in Style
feature.desc: Your family covers your expenses while in Waterdeep. You live in a wealthy lifestyle without paying for it.
